_comment: Scoring weights and metric-specific stabilization rules.

_notes.weights_sum: Configured base weights sum to 1.0 before metric-specific scaling.
_notes.google_trends_interest: Google Trends is a relative index, so it starts lighter than search_volume and is dampened again by metric_rules.
_notes.search_suggest_count: Google Suggest is a lighter support source than Google Trends, so it uses a small base weight and additional dampening.
_notes.youtube_suggest_count: YouTube Suggest is treated as a third support source with even lower contribution so it does not swing ranking by itself.
_notes.metric_rules: Phase 3b/4 adds minimum support, smoothing, contribution scaling, and normalized-value caps for unstable search-derived metrics.
_notes.change_rules: If previous-week support exists only through lightweight search-derived metrics, change_rate is suppressed.
_notes.missing_metric: When a metric is missing or ruled ineligible, scoring renormalizes across the remaining eligible metrics.
